title: Demo Mode – bypass GPS, device checks, and auth for full feature testing

requirements.text: Add a global demo mode flag that can be activated from the StaffLoginScreen demo buttons (phlebotomist, lab admin, super admin). When demo mode is active, store the selected role and a `demoMode: true` flag in a context/state accessible throughout the entire StaffApp so all guarded features are unlocked.

quotes: i want to test every feature make sure all function will open

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a demo role button on StaffLoginScreen enters demo mode with that role immediately (no Internet Identity required).
A persistent demo-mode banner is visible in StaffAppLayout while demo mode is active.
Demo mode flag and role are accessible via context to all child components and pages.

requirements.text: In demo mode, bypass all GPS geofencing, GPS accuracy checks, mock-location detection, and speed-jump anomaly checks in PhlebotomistAttendancePage and AttendancePage. Instead of real GPS coordinates, inject a fixed mock coordinate (e.g. the configured lab location) so that geofence validation always passes.

quotes: i want to test every feature make sure all function will open

acceptanceCriteria: When demo mode is active, the attendance page skips GPS permission requests and uses mock coordinates.
Geofence check always returns 'within range' in demo mode.
Mock-location detection is skipped; no security event is logged for mock location in demo mode.
The phlebotomist can start and end a shift from the attendance page without a real GPS fix.

requirements.text: In demo mode, bypass the device fingerprinting and device-binding enforcement on the attendance/shift pages. Skip the selfie capture step (or auto-accept it with a placeholder image) so the full shift start/end flow completes without a real camera.

quotes: i want to test every feature make sure all function will open

acceptanceCriteria: Device fingerprint check is skipped in demo mode; no device-mismatch security event is logged.
Selfie capture step is either hidden or auto-passes with a placeholder in demo mode.
Shift check-in and check-out complete successfully end-to-end in demo mode.

requirements.text: In demo mode, bypass the ShiftGuard so phlebotomist routes that normally require an active shift (task queue, home collection queue, vitals, hospital samples, QR scan, etc.) are all accessible without first starting a real shift. Provide a simulated active shift in demo mode.

quotes: i want to test every feature make sure all function will open

acceptanceCriteria: ShiftGuard allows navigation to all phlebotomist sub-pages when demo mode is active.
All phlebotomist pages (TaskQueuePage, HomeCollectionQueuePage, RecordVitalsPage, ScanCampQRPage, AddHospitalSamplePage, MyHospitalSamplesPage) render without redirection in demo mode.
No 'start shift first' gate screen is shown during demo mode.

requirements.text: In demo mode, seed all data-dependent pages with realistic mock/stub data so every screen renders meaningfully rather than showing empty states. This includes: bookings list, home collection queue, hospital samples, reports list, audit logs, incidents, security logs, attendance history, and notifications.

quotes: i want to test every feature make sure all function will open

acceptanceCriteria: When demo mode is active, all list pages show at least 2–3 plausible mock entries instead of empty states.
Mock data reflects the active demo role (e.g. phlebotomist demo shows phlebotomist-relevant bookings).
Admin demo role shows audit logs, incidents, and security log entries.
Notification bell shows at least one unread notification in demo mode.

requirements.text: In demo mode, all mutating actions (status updates, report uploads, vitals submission, camp QR scan, incident submission, billing edits) should optimistically succeed with a toast confirmation without making real backend calls, or gracefully handle backend failures without crashing.

quotes: i want to test every feature make sure all function will open

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting any form or mutation in demo mode shows a success toast and updates local UI state.
No unhandled errors or blank screens appear when backend calls fail or are skipped in demo mode.
File upload flows (report upload, selfie, incident photo) accept any input and show a simulated progress/success state.

requirements.text: Add a patient demo mode entry point on the PatientLoginScreen (or AppSelectorPage) so the Patient App can also be tested without Internet Identity. Patient demo mode should populate mock bookings, reports, home collection requests, vitals, and hospital samples.

quotes: i want to test every feature make sure all function will open

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Demo Patient' button is available on the patient login or app selector screen.
Clicking it enters patient demo mode with a mock patient profile.
All patient pages render with mock data: bookings, reports, home collections, vitals, hospital samples.
A demo banner is visible in PatientAppLayout while patient demo mode is active.

constraints: Demo mode must never disable security checks in production (non-demo) paths — it is purely a client-side testing layer.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
All demo mode logic must be additive and must not break existing authenticated flows.
nonGoals: Persisting demo sessions to the backend.
Creating a separate backend canister or mock server for demo mode.
Changing the GPS accuracy threshold (already handled in a prior version).
